title: Create and Destroy
description: The best modpack for creation and destruction!
body: A modpack built for the purpose of creation and destruction! Build a massive infistructure with automation and transport from the Create mod and tear it down with the hundreds of explosives added in Lucky TNT! Explore the updated nether and end dimesions to become as rich and powerful as possible with automation and explosives! Whatever your needs, its (probably) here! You will have fun alone or with friends, good luck and have fun!
